scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p ../static/vendor/pdfjs && cp -R node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build ../static/vendor/pdfjs && mkdir -p ../static/vendor/jspdf && cp node_modules/jspdf/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js ../static/vendor/jspdf/ && node_modules/.bin/esbuild blob-client-entry.js --bundle --global-name=VercelBlobClient --platform=browser --outfile=../static/vendor/vercel-blob-client.js --minify
